title: Vendam Kadhal Pothum Pothum Poi Vidu Lyrics Jhangri
stanzas: Thooki Erinjittu - Vendam Kadhal Pothum Pothum Poi Vidu Lyrics Jhangri Song Lyrics

Thooki erinjitu
pora pora kadhala
usura edukkura
podhum indha vethana

thunda naanum odaiyuren
neeyum sonna varthaiyaal
penne unna nenachuthaan
vazhkaiyo engo tholaikuren

ye kadhal ellaam maayama
thulir kanneer mattum
minjumaa
vidhi endru solli
marakkavaa
indha kadhalai moththava
verukkavaa

unnai thunbathil thalli
rasithavan
inge inbamaai thulli
kudhikiraan

adi anbaaga neeyum
nandraaga vazha
ellaame seithene

penne modhal illa
kadhal thaan
inga ulagil engum illaiye
manam onna rendaa
serndhutaa adhupola
kadhal illaiye

adi sonthangal unnai marakkalam
un sogangal kandu sirikkalaam
aanaal unnai naan nedrum
un nenjil vaippen
en anbu maaraathe

unakkaage naanum irukkuren
marukkaathe ennai nambidu
manasellaam neeye nirkkiraai
un idhayam konjam thandhidu

Thooki erinjitu
pora pora kadhala

thaniya nadakkuren
kalgal pogum padhaiyil

edhir paartha kannil thaan
sila neerthuli pookirathe
valiyodu anbe naan
veedhiyil alaigirene

vidai illaa kelvi pola
en kadhalum irukkirathe
oru varthai sonnaalum
en vazhkaiyum pizhaithidume

nillu sollaamal pogaathe
en kanneerum theeraathe
unnai naan paarkaamal
manam mullaaga maariduthe

unnai thunbathil thalli
rasiththavan ingae
inbamaai thulli kudhikkiraan

adi anbaaga neeyum
nandraaga vazha
ellaame seithene

adi sonthangal unnai marakkalam
un sogangal kandu sirikkalaam
aanaal unnai naan nedrum
un nenjil vaippen
en anbu maaraathe

vendaam kadhal
podhum podhum poi vidu
meendum orumurai
vendaam andha vaethanai

oru kadhal kaayam aarumunn
marukadhal ennai ketkuthe
enakkaaga edhaiyum seiyyave
avan nenjam ellaam thudikkuthe

naan aasai ellaam verukkiren
mana vaazhkai siraiyil
thavikkiren

unakkaaga ennai maatrave
en manasil idamum illaiye

unnai thunbathil thalli
rasithavan
inge inbamaai thulli
kudhikiraan

adi anbaaga neeyum
nandraaga vazha
ellaame seithene

penne modhal illa
kadhal thaan
inga ulagil engum illaiye
manam onna rendaa
serndhutaa adhupola
kadhal illaiye

unakkaage naanum irukkuren
marukkaathe ennai nambidu
manasellaam neeye nirkkiraai
un idhayam konjam thandhidu

enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Vendam Kadhal Pothum Pothum Poi Vidu delves into the complexities of love, portraying a sense of yearning and emotional struggle. Its lyrics reflect a deep introspection about relationships, making it relatable for anyone who has experienced love's highs and lows. The soothing melody complements the melancholic theme, evoking feelings of nostalgia and reflection. This track serves as a poignant reminder of the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vendam Kadhal Pothum Pothum Poi Vidu is a poignant melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. The song's heartfelt lyrics resonate deeply, making it a perfect companion for those reflective moments. Experience the emotional depth of this track that speaks to the soul, inviting listeners to explore the nuances of love and heartbreak.
stanzaMeanings: I don't want to take love; it's enough to let it go.
I am going away, love is taking my breath away, this pain is enough.
I too am running away, and you said those words, girl, I thought of you, where is my life going?
Is all this love just an illusion? Should I forget this love that brings tears like a flower?
In your sorrow, the one who has pushed me away is now drinking joyfully here.
I have done everything with love, and you are living well.
Girl, there is no love here, nowhere in this world. If our hearts unite, then there is no love either.
I can forget you, but I can't ignore my feelings. Even if I see you, my love won't change.
I am here for you, don't forget me. You are everything to me, give me a little of your heart.
I don't want to take love; it's enough to let it go.
I walk alone on the path where the stones fall.
When I look ahead, some tears fall from my eyes. With love, I am wandering on the street.
Like a question without an answer, my love remains. Even if I say one word, my life will be ruined.
Don't go without saying anything, my tears won't dry. Without seeing you, my heart has changed.
In your sorrow, the one who has pushed me away is now drinking joyfully here.
I have done everything with love, and you are living well.
Girl, there is no love here, nowhere in this world. If our hearts unite, then there is no love either.
I am here for you, don't forget me. You are everything to me, give me a little of your heart.
I don't want to take love; it's enough to let it go again, that pain is enough.
A love that is a burden, no one can forget. My heart is aching to do anything for you.
I desire everything, but I am suffering in my mind.
For you, I have no place in my heart anymore.
In your sorrow, the one who has pushed me away is now drinking joyfully here.
I have done everything with love, and you are living well.
Girl, there is no love here, nowhere in this world. If our hearts unite, then there is no love either.
I am here for you, don't forget me. You are everything to me, give me a little of your heart.
I don't want to take love; it's enough to let it go.
